case_title: JORGE ADALBERTO ANDRADE VS. RIGOBERTO ANTONIO ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRADE, JORGE ADALBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RIGOBERTO ANTONIO LOZANO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA POLANCO'S TOWING SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDRADE, JORGE ADALBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RIGOBERTO ANTONIO LOZANO, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA POLANCO'S TOWING SERVICE $20,673.21 PRINCIPAL, $254.61 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,227.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
